tools.name: discovery_list_plans
tools.description:
List available Disco plans with pricing.

    No authentication required. Returns all available subscription tiers
    with credit allowances and pricing. Use this to help users choose a plan.

tools.name: discovery_estimate
tools.description:
Estimate the credits required to run a Disco analysis.

    Returns `required_credits` for public (always 0) and private, with private
    split by whether LLMs are enabled (use_llms=False is faster, use_llms=True
    adds smarter preprocessing, literature context and a written summary).
    Also re

tools.name: discovery_upload
tools.description:
Upload a dataset file and return a file reference for use with discovery_analyze.

    Call this before discovery_analyze. Pass the returned result directly to
    discovery_analyze as the file_ref argument.

    Provide exactly one of: file_url, file_path, or file_content.

    Args:
        file_u

tools.name: discovery_analyze
tools.description:
Run Disco on tabular data to find novel, statistically validated patterns.

    This is NOT another data analyst — it's a discovery pipeline that systematically
    searches for feature interactions, subgroup effects, and conditional relationships
    nobody thought to look for, then validates each

tools.name: discovery_status
tools.description:
Check the status of a Disco run.

    Returns current status and progress details:
    - status: "pending" | "processing" | "completed" | "failed"
    - job_status: underlying job queue status
    - queue_position: position in queue when pending (1 = next up)
    - current_step: active pipeline step

tools.name: discovery_get_results
tools.description:
Fetch the full results of a completed Disco run.

    Returns discovered patterns (with conditions, p-values, novelty scores,
    citations), feature importance scores, a summary with key insights, column
    statistics, and suggestions for what to explore next.

    The response includes a `dashboa

tools.name: discovery_account
tools.description:
Check your Disco account status.

    Returns current plan, available credits (subscription + purchased), and
    payment method status. Use this to verify you have sufficient credits
    before running a private analysis.

    Args:
        api_key: Disco API key (disco_...). Optional if DISCOVERY_

tools.name: discovery_signup
tools.description:
Create a Disco account and get an API key.

    Provide an email address to start the signup flow. If email verification
    is required, returns {"status": "verification_required"} — the user will
    receive a 6-digit code by email, then call discovery_signup_verify to
    complete signup and rece

tools.name: discovery_signup_verify
tools.description:
Complete Disco signup using an email verification code.

    Call this after discovery_signup returns {"status": "verification_required"}.
    The user receives a 6-digit code by email — pass it here along with the
    same email address used in discovery_signup. Returns an API key on success.

tools.name: discovery_login
tools.description:
Get a new API key for an existing Disco account.

    Sends a 6-digit verification code to the email address. Call
    discovery_login_verify with the code to receive a new API key.
    Use this when you need an API key for an account that already exists
    (e.g. the key was lost or this is a new a

tools.name: discovery_login_verify
tools.description:
Complete login and receive a new API key.

    Call this after discovery_login returns {"status": "verification_required"}.
    The user receives a 6-digit code by email — pass it here along with the
    same email address. Returns a new API key on success.

    Args:
        email: Email address us

tools.name: discovery_add_payment_method
tools.description:
Attach a Stripe payment method to your Disco account.

    The payment method must be tokenized via Stripe's API first — card details
    never touch Disco's servers. Required before purchasing credits
    or subscribing to a paid plan.

    To tokenize a card, call Stripe's API directly:
    POST h

tools.name: discovery_purchase_credits
tools.description:
Purchase Disco credit packs using a stored payment method.

    Credits cost $0.10 each, sold in packs of 100 ($10/pack). Credits are used
    for private analyses (public analyses are free). Requires a payment method
    on file — use discovery_add_payment_method first.

    Args:
        packs: Nu

tools.name: discovery_subscribe
tools.description:
Subscribe to or change your Disco plan.

    Available plans:
    - "free_tier": Explorer — free, 10 credits/month
    - "tier_1": Researcher — $49/month, 500 credits/month
    - "tier_2": Team — $199/month, 2000 credits/month

    Paid plans require a payment method on file. Credits roll over on pa

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "discovery_estimate" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: discovery_analyze, discovery_signup, discovery_login, discovery_login_verify · Private data: discovery_estimate, discovery_upload, discovery_analyze, discovery_status, discovery_get_results, discovery_account, discovery_signup, discovery_signup_verify, discovery_login, discovery_login_verify, discovery_add_payment_method, discovery_purchase_credits, discovery_subscribe · Public sink: discovery_upload, discovery_analyze, discovery_signup, discovery_signup_verify, discovery_login, discovery_login_verify, discovery_add_payment_method · Destructive: discovery_estimate, discovery_upload, discovery_analyze, discovery_status, discovery_get_results.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: discovery_analyze, discovery_signup, discovery_login, discovery_login_verify · Private data: discovery_estimate, discovery_upload, discovery_analyze, discovery_status, discovery_get_results, discovery_account, discovery_signup, discovery_signup_verify, discovery_login, discovery_login_verify, discovery_add_payment_method, discovery_purchase_credits, discovery_subscribe · Public sink: discovery_upload, discovery_analyze, discovery_signup, discovery_signup_verify, discovery_login, discovery_login_verify, discovery_add_payment_method · Destructive: discovery_estimate, discovery_upload, discovery_analyze, discovery_status, discovery_get_results

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
